title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Dalmia Bharat Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Dalmia Bharat Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Dalmia Bharat Holdings Services is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Varanasi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Dalmia Bharat Holdings Services:
Dalmia Bharat Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dalmia Bharat Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
